name: Chocolate Malted Ice Box Pudding
recipeIngredient: 4 slices Pumpernickel bread; made into soft, day-old bread and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat 2 1/2 cups of heavy cream with malted milk powder and icing sugar until stiff peaks form.
2. Beat in the vanilla extract.
3. Fold in the finely grated chocolate (4 ounces).
4. Gently fold in the bread crumbs.
5. Spoon the mixture into a 1 1/2 to 2-quart souffle dish and refrigerate, covered, overnight.
6. No more than three hours before serving, beat the remaining 1/2 cup of heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
7. Using a pastry bag, pipe the remaining cream in concentric circles over the top.
8. Keep chilled until ready to serve.
SERVES: 6-8
